content.full_text:
RAVI MEHTA
CHAIRMAN

FAIR POLITICAL PRACTICES COMMISSION

March 25, 1996

Grey Williams
Assembly Republican Caucus
1020 N Street, Ste. 408
Sacramento, CA  95814

Re:  Your Request for Informal
Assistance
Our File No. I-96-076

Dear Mr. Williams:

You have requested advice concerning the campaign provisions of the Political Reform Act (the "Act").1/ Section 83114 provides that any person may request an opinion or written advice from the Commission with respect to his or her own duties under the Act. FPPC Regulation 18329 (copy enclosed) establishes the procedures under which the Commission issues written advice.

Pursuant to subsection (c)(4) of Regulation 18329, we decline to provide written advice to you at this time.  However, I am enclosing a copy of FPPC Regulation 18421.1 concerning the disclosure of the making and receipt of contributions, which may answer your questions.

If you wish to request written advice concerning a specific set of facts, please feel free to write again.  If you have questions concerning this letter, please contact me at (916) 322-5660.

Sincerely,

Steven G. Churchwell
General Counsel

By:  Carla Wardlow
Division Chief
Technical Assistance Division

Enclosures

_______________________
1/  Government Code Sections 81000-91015.  All statutory references are to the Government Code unless otherwise indicated.  Commission regulations appear at 2 California Code of Regulations Section 18000, et seq.  All references to regulations are to Title 2, Division 6 of the California Code of Regulations.

428 J STREET, SUITE 800, SACRAMENTO, CALIFORNIA 95814  (916) 322-5660
